questions.question: Analyze the relationship between the 'Hours of Sleep' feature and the 'Academic Performance' target variable in the dataset provided. What insights can you draw from this analysis?
questions.hint: Focus on visualizing the data and identifying any patterns or correlations.

questions.question: Using the Scikit-Learn library, preprocess the 'Features' dataset by handling missing values and scaling the data. Then, perform dimensionality reduction using PCA and evaluate the results.
questions.hint: Make sure to document your code and metrics used for evaluation.

questions.question: Compare the performance of different machine learning algorithms (e.g., linear regression, decision trees, random forests) on the 'Target Variable' using cross-validation. Which algorithm performs best, and why?
questions.hint: Consider using techniques like grid search and feature importance to evaluate model performance.
